name: Non-Dessert Apple Ideas
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice up apples and saute them with onions and curry powder.
2. Add pork chops, cover, and simmer about 10 minutes.
3. Combine chicken, red grapes, and cook until ready to bake.
4. For cranberry sauce: Use half chopped cranberries and half diced apples. Add enough water to cover the mixture and brown sugar to taste.
